name: Crunchy Waffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine dry ingredients in a large bowl and stir well.
2. In a separate bowl, beat eggs until thick and lemon-colored.
3. Add flour mixture, buttermilk, maple syrup (or honey), and oil to the beaten eggs. Stir until smooth.
4. Cook batter on a hot, lightly oiled waffle iron. Sprinkle chopped pecans on top before cooking.
5. Serve with Strawberry-Banana Sauce and plain yogurt.
Strawberry-Banana Sauce:
1. Combine all ingredients in a heavy saucepan.
2. Cook over medium-high heat for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Serve hot.
